payload.summary: No amendments. Agent-produced artifact persistence now consistently derives `producer.backend_family` and `producer.model_id` from `InvocationEnvelope.metadata` across the generic stage path and the prompt-review, completion, and final-review supporting-record paths, and `ArtifactRecord` serialization already writes those nested fields. I verified the wiring in source and the targeted `agent_record_producer_uses_invocation_metadata_fields` test passes.
